product_brief: Passive network security monitoring sensor for OT and IoT asset visibility, threat detection, and vulnerability management.
pqc_capability_description: Not stated. The document describes passive network monitoring, asset inventory, and threat detection but contains no mention of Post-Quantum Cryptography algorithms, implementation, or migration plans.
architecture_type: Passive network monitoring sensors (hardware appliances, virtual machines, embedded devices, containers) sending data to a Central Management Console (on-prem or cloud).
primary_platforms: Hardware appliances (NSG-HS, NSG-H, NSG-M, NS20, NS1 series), Virtual Machines, Containers, Embedded devices. Management via Nozomi Vantage Cloud or On-prem Central Management Console.
target_industries: Airports, Electric Utilities, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Maritime, Mining, Oil & Gas, Pharmaceutical, Rail, Retail, Smart Cities, Stadiums & Arenas, Water & Wastewater, Federal Government, State & Local.
regulatory_status: Compliant with ISA/IEC 62443 Standards, NERC CIP, NERC CIP-015, NIS2 Directive, SEC Cybersecurity Rules, TSA Security Directives.
